address: Ban Santichon, Tambon Mae Hi, Amphoe Pai, Mae Hong Son 58130

description.en: Yunnan Chinese settlement village founded by Kuomintang refugees, offering traditional tea houses, steamed buns, clay shooting activities, and panoramic mountain viewpoints.
description.nl: Yunnan Chinees nederzettingsdorp gesticht door Kuomintang-vluchtelingen, met traditionele theehuizen, gestoomde broodjes, kleischieten en panoramische berg-uitkijkpunten.

metaTitle.en: Chinese Village Santichon - Top Attraction in Pai | Go2Thailand

metaDescription.en: Discover Chinese Village Santichon in Pai. Yunnan Chinese settlement with tea houses, steamed buns and mountain views.
